positive: A stylized, abstract illustration of a cosmic mountain range composed of crystalline structures and nebulae, set against a deep indigo and violet sky. The composition is centralized and symmetrical, featuring clean, sharp silhouettes of floating monolithic peaks that refract starlight. Incorporate bioluminescent flora and fauna that mimic constellations. The art style should be modern ethereal geometry mixed with neo-art deco celestial themes, rendered with thick, graphic linework and vivid, jewel-toned colors (sapphire, amethyst, turquoise, silver accents). The overall feel must be high contrast and print-optimized for apparel transfer, with clear separation between elements and strong graphic impact. Flat vector illustration quality, high saturation, cinematic studio lighting.
negative: photorealistic, messy, blurry, noise, low detail, watermark, text, logo, signature, artifact, poorly rendered, multiple limbs, extra fingers, bad anatomy, grainy
